docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY ARAB, RUWAID AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARAB, RUWAID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOS, NANCY $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $880.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
